news.paragraph: Coinbase is navigating a period of internal restructuring following a 14% workforce reduction while actively lobbying for the passage of the CLARITY Act to address regulatory concerns. While the broader crypto market is seeing some activity in meme coins, the company is also focusing on product diversification and AI strategies to combat market headwinds. Traders should weigh these operational changes and ongoing regulatory developments when considering new positions.
headlines: Did Pi Coin Price Just Flash a Date for a 23% Breakout Revival?
